name: Manager JIT memory + runbook
description: before_prompt_build: rebuilds MEMORY.md on change and injects it, plus the prompt-relevant sections of MANAGER-RUNBOOK.md under a byte budget. Manager (main) only. (critique P2-1 + P1-1)

agentId.description: Only inject for this agent id (default: main).

runbookByteBudget.description: Max bytes of runbook sections to inject per turn (default 6000). [always] is always included.
